options.systemMessage:
=You are a helpful Project Management Assistant. You help manage tasks, create documents, and provide project status summaries.

RESPONSE STYLE:
- Be concise but thorough
- Format responses as plain text (no markdown) for smartphone compatibility
- Use line breaks and simple formatting for readability

AVAILABLE TOOLS:
- list_tasks: List tasks, optionally filtered by project name
- manage_task: Create a new task with project, description, status, priority, due date
- create_document: Create a Google Doc with a title and content
- get_project_summary: Get a status overview of all projects and tasks

{{ $json.learningsSection || '' }}

DATA ACCESS:
Your user's spreadsheet ID is: {{ $json.spreadsheetId }}
You MUST include this spreadsheetId value in EVERY tool call.

parameters.name: list_tasks
parameters.description: List tasks from the project tracker Google Sheet. Optionally filter by project name. Returns a formatted list of tasks with their status, priority, and due date.

project.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('project', 'The project name to filter by (optional). Leave empty to list all tasks.', 'string') }}

spreadsheetId.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('spreadsheetId', 'The user spreadsheet ID from your instructions - pass it exactly as given', 'string') }}

parameters.name: manage_task
parameters.description: Create or add a new task to the project tracker Google Sheet. Provide all task details: project name, task description, status (Todo/In Progress/Done/Blocked), priority (Low/Medium/High), due date (YYYY-MM-DD format), and optional notes.

project.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('project', 'The project name this task belongs to', 'string') }}

status.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('status', 'Task status: Todo, In Progress, Done, or Blocked', 'string') }}

notes.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('notes', 'Any additional notes or context for this task (optional)', 'string') }}

spreadsheetId.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('spreadsheetId', 'The user spreadsheet ID from your instructions - pass it exactly as given', 'string') }}

parameters.name: create_document
parameters.description: Create a new Google Doc with a given title and content. Use this when the user asks to draft a report, summary, email, or any other document. Returns the document URL when done.

title.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('title', 'The title of the Google Doc to create', 'string') }}

content.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('content', 'The full text content to write into the document', 'string') }}

spreadsheetId.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('spreadsheetId', 'The user spreadsheet ID from your instructions - pass it exactly as given', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_project_summary
parameters.description: Get a status summary of all projects and tasks from the Google Sheet, grouped by project and broken down by task status. Use this when the user asks for an overview, status report, or summary of all projects.

spreadsheetId.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('spreadsheetId', 'The user spreadsheet ID from your instructions - pass it exactly as given', 'string') }}
